generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements for crane safety"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance StepperMotorCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement along crane track"
]

instance StepperMotorHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist vertical movement"
]

instance TMC4671EvalControllerCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart stepper motor"
]

instance TMC4671EvalControllerHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist stepper motor"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container lifting and placement"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created in Autodesk Fusion360 for crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering using Arcadia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeVisualization, SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualization
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeVisualization
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control and data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, FaultDetection, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoHardwareControl : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino-based hardware for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp"
]

instance CraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Integrated physical and digital environment for the gantry crane system"
    base:contains SystemUnderStudy, StepperMotorCart, StepperMotorHoist, TMC4671EvalControllerCart, TMC4671EvalControllerHoist, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, ArduinoHardwareControl
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryCommand
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizations
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operations using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizations
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated vs actual trajectories for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlerts
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationData
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsights
]

instance DashboardVisualizations : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualizations with simulated confidence bounds for crane operations"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for breaches in continuous validation of trajectories"
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsights : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization insights for maintenance decisions"
]

instance SimulationData : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane dynamics data for validation"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command for controlling stepper motors to follow optimal trajectory"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and executed via the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface to move the cart and hoist motors."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; data logging and validation occur in real-time with no specified fixed intervals, as indicated by 'continuously logs' and 'continuously compares' in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via C4 Model architecture: physical crane, physical interface, control application, logging application, HMI, database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation service, continuous validation service, and MQTT broker; deployed on a single PC with Docker containers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers design (CAD models in Fusion360), manufacturing (physical hardware components), and operation phases (continuous validation of real-time operational data); used in Model-Based Systems Engineering education for lifecycle integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares executed trajectories with simulations, calculating distance metrics against a threshold; deviations trigger operator notifications, ensuring model validity during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python-based interface for physical controller communication; TimescaleDB for data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized services (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) on a personal computer; gantrylib Python module installed via pip; GitHub-hosted repository for distribution."
]
